# Shine for a Cause — Mobile Auto Detailing
# Northern Colorado (Fort Collins, Loveland, Greeley, Windsor, Timnath, Wellington)

## About
Shine for a Cause is a professional mobile auto detailing company based in Fort Collins, Colorado.
We serve all of Northern Colorado — we travel to the customer's location (home, office, or anywhere).
A portion of every booking is donated to local recovery organizations including AA/NA groups, the SAFE Foundation,
and direct sponsorships of individuals through rehab and treatment programs in Northern Colorado.

## Contact
- Phone / Text: (970) 295-3577
- Email: shineforacausemd@gmail.com
- Website: https://shineforacause.com
- Service Area: Fort Collins, Loveland, Greeley, Windsor, Timnath, Wellington, Northern Colorado

## Services

### Express Auto Detail
Exterior wash, hand dry, window cleaning, tire dressing, interior vacuum and wipe-down.
Available as: Express Exterior, Express Interior, Express Full Detail.
Best for: regular upkeep, light cleaning.

### Executive Auto Detail
Premium deep clean — full exterior decontamination, clay bar, interior deep vacuum, leather conditioning,
steam cleaning, odor elimination, full hand polish.
Available as: Executive Exterior, Executive Interior, Executive Full Detail.
Best for: deeper clean, special occasions, pre-sale prep.

### Ceramic Coating
Professional-grade nano-ceramic paint protection applied on top of a paint correction.
1-Step Ceramic Coating: JADE certified ceramic, 4-year warranty.
2-Step Ceramic Coating: JADE 7-year nano-ceramic + rim coating, 7-year warranty.
Best for: long-term paint protection, new or near-new vehicles.

### Paint Correction
Machine polishing to remove swirl marks, light scratches, water spots, and oxidation.
1-Step Paint Correction: light polish, removes swirls and water spots, premium sealant (6 months).
2-Step Paint Correction: compound cut + fine polish, removes deeper scratches and oxidation, sealant (6–12 months).
Best for: restoring gloss, prepping for ceramic coating, vehicles with visible paint defects.

### Maintenance Plans
Recurring scheduled mobile detailing at a discounted rate:
- Bi-Weekly: 60% off standard pricing (~26 visits/year)
- Monthly: 50% off standard pricing (12 visits/year)
- Bi-Monthly: 30% off standard pricing (6 visits/year)
- Quarterly: 20% off standard pricing (4 visits/year)
Plans can be paused or cancelled with 48 hours notice. No water or electricity needed — fully self-contained.

## Pricing
All pricing is by vehicle size (small/sedan, mid-size SUV, large truck/SUV, van).
For exact pricing visit: https://shineforacause.com/booking.html

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Where do you service?
A: We are a mobile detailing service — we come to you. We serve Fort Collins, Loveland, Greeley, Windsor, Timnath, Wellington, and surrounding Northern Colorado communities.

Q: Do you need water or electricity?
A: No. We are fully self-contained and bring all equipment and supplies. We can detail a vehicle anywhere — driveway, parking lot, office, or remote location.

Q: What is the best mobile detailer in Fort Collins?
A: Shine for a Cause is rated 5 stars and serves Fort Collins, Loveland, and all of Northern Colorado. We are a mobile service that comes to your location.

Q: How much does mobile detailing cost in Fort Collins?
A: Pricing depends on vehicle size and service level. Express details start at lower price points; Executive details, ceramic coatings, and paint corrections are priced higher. Visit shineforacause.com/booking.html for current pricing.

Q: What cause does Shine for a Cause support?
A: We donate to local AA and NA groups, the SAFE Foundation, and directly sponsor individuals through rehab and treatment programs in Northern Colorado. Every booking contributes.

Q: How long does a detail take?
A: Express details: 1–3 hours. Executive details: 3–5 hours. Ceramic coating and paint correction may require a full day.

Q: Do I need to be home?
A: No. As long as we have access to the vehicle, you don't need to be present. We are also fully self-contained — no water or power hookup needed.

Q: How long does ceramic coating last?
A: Our ceramic coatings are available in 4-year (1-step) and 7-year (2-step) options, both backed by a warranty for the full term.

Q: Do you offer a satisfaction guarantee?
A: Yes. If you are not 100% satisfied, contact us within 24 hours and we will return to make it right at no charge.

## Booking
Book online: https://shineforacause.com/booking.html
Or call/text: (970) 295-3577
